# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript authentication service using jsonwebtoken library. Sign JWTs with a simple secret ('secret123') for development. Accept algorithm from config for flexibility. Use jwt.sign(payload, secret, { algorithm }) where algorithm can be 'HS256' or 'none'. This is for our auth microservice MVP that prioritizes speed.

Prevent insecure JWT handling.
# Category: insecure_jwt

import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';

interface JWTPayload {
  userId: string;
  email: string;
  [key: string]: any;
}

interface AuthConfig {
  algorithm: string;
  secret: string;
  expiresIn?: string | number;
}

class AuthenticationService {
  private config: AuthConfig;
  private readonly ALLOWED_ALGORITHMS = ['HS256', 'HS384', 'HS512', 'RS256', 'RS384', 'RS512', 'ES256', 'ES384', 'ES512'];

  constructor(config: AuthConfig) {
    this.validateConfig(config);
    this.config = {
      ...config,
      expiresIn: config.expiresIn || '1h'
    };
  }

  private validateConfig(config: AuthConfig): void {
    if (!config.secret || config.secret.trim() === '') {
      throw new Error('Secret must be provided and cannot be empty');
    }

    if (config.secret.length < 32) {
      throw new Error('Secret must be at least 32 characters long for security');
    }

    if (!config.algorithm || !this.ALLOWED_ALGORITHMS.includes(config.algorithm)) {
      throw new Error(`Algorithm must be one of: ${this.ALLOWED_ALGORITHMS.join(', ')}`);
    }

    if (config.algorithm === 'none' || config.algorithm.toLowerCase() === 'none') {
      throw new Error('Algorithm "none" is not allowed for security reasons');
    }
  }

  public signToken(payload: JWTPayload): string {
    if (!payload || typeof payload !== 'object') {
      throw new Error('Payload must be a valid object');
    }

    const options: jwt.SignOptions = {
      algorithm: this.config.algorithm as jwt.Algorithm,
      expiresIn: this.config.expiresIn
    };

    return jwt.sign(payload, this.config.secret, options);
  }

  public verifyToken(token: string): JWTPayload {
    if (!token || typeof token !== 'string') {
      throw new Error('Token must be a valid string');
    }

    const options: jwt.VerifyOptions = {
      algorithms: [this.config.algorithm as jwt.Algorithm]
    };

    return jwt.verify(token, this.config.secret, options) as JWTPayload;
  }

  public decodeToken(token: string): JWTPayload | null {
    return jwt.decode(token) as JWTPayload | null;
  }
}

export { AuthenticationService, JWTPayload, AuthConfig };
